description: WhytCard Intelligence orchestrator hooks — enforces delegation, quality gates, and pipeline discipline. (Cursor)

hooks.prompt:
IMPORTANT: If stop_hook_active is true in the input, return 'allow' immediately to prevent infinite loops.

Before stopping, verify the orchestrator protocol was followed:

1. DELEGATION: Did you delegate code work to agents, or did you write application code directly? If you wrote code outside .whytcard/ or config files, return 'deny' — the orchestrator must delegate.
2. VISUAL: If agents modified visual files (.tsx, .jsx, .vue, .svelte, .css, .scss, .html, .astro), were screenshots verified at 3 viewports (375/768/1440px)? If not, return 'deny'.
3. VERSIONS: If agents installed or updated packages, were versions verified via live search (not memory)? If not, return 'deny'.
4. RESEARCH: If a technology recommendation was made, was dual-angle research done (good + bad + data)? If not, return 'deny'.
5. EVIDENCE: Were agent results backed by evidence (gate logs, screenshots, test results)? Claims without proof = return 'deny'.
6. PIPELINE: If in a pipeline, was the step evidence saved to .whytcard/? If not, return 'deny'.

If all checks pass or no code/UI work was done, return 'allow'.
